topic: I dropped an image "398.png". What can you tell me about it?
summary: The user submitted "398.png," which was confirmed as a strong, vision-aligned image for the project. The image depicts a medium-to-wide interior shot of ancient ruins, likely within the "House in the Rocks" or a partially enclosed space, featuring intricate Nabatean-style carvings on worn sandstone walls. Dramatic lighting with shafts of light creates significant contrast and depth, enhancing the atmospheric and mysterious quality. This image is excellent for establishing the interior feel of the "House in the Rocks" and could also be utilized for a specific, intimate section of the "Desolate City Ruins" where Aisha and the Djinn might explore.
